creator: adamw@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to John Marino from comment #18)
> if LICENSE_FILE exists, that file is installed with the binary package.  All
> the licenses are installed in a standard location.

Ahh now I understand. LICENSE_FILE does what submitter's original patch attempted to do.

Fabian, it sounds like LICENSE_FILE is really the right thing to use here. Can I get your permission to use that instead of installing it into DOCSDIR manually?
